forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 54. West southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 63. West southwest wind 8 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
As night enfolds Downtown San Francisco, the air carries a gentle crispness, tinged with both the lingering warmth of the day and the cool whisper of the ocean. The forecast offers a hint of what tomorrow will bring: a mostly sunny day, beckoning with the promise of blue skies and a high of 63. Winds from the west southwest will dance playfully, their light touch ruffling leaves and stirring the soul. Overnight, temperatures will settle around 54, guiding the city under a cloak of partly cloudy skies, where the silver moonlight plays hide-and-seek with drifting clouds.

As day breaks, the morning may greet the city with a soft marine layer wrapping the bay, momentarily blurring the outlines of familiar landmarks. However, it won’t take long for the sun to pierce through, illuminating the streets and inviting San Franciscans outdoors. One might consider a long stroll along the Embarcadero or a quiet moment in Golden Gate Park, where the beauty of the flora and the serenity of nature create a perfect backdrop for reflection. Dress in layers; a light cardigan or a denim jacket will provide comfort against the cool morning breeze, transforming into a more relaxed attire as the sun rises higher. Embrace the unfolding day with an open heart, savoring all the simple pleasures it has to offer.
